#!/usr/bin/env pwsh
<#
.SYNOPSIS
  CLI wrapper for the SemVerBumper module.

.PARAMETER VersionPath
  Path to a package.json or plain VERSION file.

.PARAMETER CommitsPath
  Path to a commit-log fixture (commits separated by lines of '---').
  Takes precedence over -Commits.

.PARAMETER Commits
  Array of commit messages (alternative to -CommitsPath).

.PARAMETER ChangelogPath
  Path to CHANGELOG.md to prepend a new entry to.

.OUTPUTS
  Prints "NEW_VERSION=<x.y.z>" and "BUMP=<level>" to stdout.
#>
[CmdletBinding()]
param(
    [Parameter(Mandatory)][string]$VersionPath,
    [string]$CommitsPath,
    [string[]]$Commits,
    [string]$ChangelogPath
)

Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'

Import-Module (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot 'SemVerBumper.psm1') -Force

try {
    if ($CommitsPath) {
        $Commits = Read-CommitFixture -Path $CommitsPath
    }
    if (-not $Commits) {
        throw "Provide -CommitsPath or -Commits."
    }

    $result = Invoke-VersionBump -VersionPath $VersionPath -Commits $Commits -ChangelogPath $ChangelogPath

    Write-Output "OLD_VERSION=$($result.OldVersion)"
    Write-Output "NEW_VERSION=$($result.NewVersion)"
    Write-Output "BUMP=$($result.Bump)"
    Write-Output "---CHANGELOG---"
    Write-Output $result.Changelog
}
catch {
    Write-Error "bump-version failed: $($_.Exception.Message)"
    exit 1
}

input.content:
name: semantic-version-bumper

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: "Commit fixture to use (patch|minor|major)"
        required: false
        default: "minor"

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  # Test harness sets FIXTURE_NAME to select which fixture drives the run.
  FIXTURE_NAME: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || 'minor' }}

jobs:
  test:
    name: Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./SemVerBumper.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester failed: $($r.FailedCount) test(s)." }

  bump:
    name: Compute version bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run bump-version against fixture
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          FIXTURE_NAME: ${{ env.FIXTURE_NAME }}
        run: |
          $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
          $fixture = $env:FIXTURE_NAME
          if (-not $fixture) { $fixture = 'minor' }
          $commitPath = "./fixtures/commits-$fixture.txt"
          if (-not (Test-Path $commitPath)) { throw "Missing fixture: $commitPath" }

          # Work on a throwaway copy of package.json so CI stays idempotent.
          $pkg = Join-Path ([System.IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) "package-$([guid]::NewGuid()).json"
          '{ "name": "demo", "version": "1.1.0" }' | Set-Content -LiteralPath $pkg

          $changelog = Join-Path ([System.IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) "CHANGELOG-$([guid]::NewGuid()).md"

          $out = & ./bump-version.ps1 -VersionPath $pkg -CommitsPath $commitPath -ChangelogPath $changelog
          $out | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ }

          # Emit machine-checkable markers for the test harness.
          $newLine = $out | Where-Object { $_ -like 'NEW_VERSION=*' } | Select-Object -First 1
          $bumpLine = $out | Where-Object { $_ -like 'BUMP=*' } | Select-Object -First 1
          if (-not $newLine) { throw "bump-version did not emit NEW_VERSION" }
          Write-Host "RESULT $newLine"
          Write-Host "RESULT $bumpLine"

        $succeeded = ([regex]::Matches($r.Output, 'Job succeeded')).Count

        $failed    | Should -Be 0 -Because "no jobs should fail, output:`n$($r.Output)"

        # Exact-value assertions.
        $r.Output | Should -Match "NEW_VERSION=$([regex]::Escape($ExpectedVersion))"
        $r.Output | Should -Match "BUMP=$ExpectedBump"
